default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between GrowthXLabs and Litebox Strategies to review logo design iterations and discuss next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two logo design options (A and B) were presented, with refinements based on previous feedback](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Option A maintains the symbol's hierarchy, while Option B uses the diamond shape across all letters](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Marcel provided detailed feedback on both options, preferring an uppercase G for Option B](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Next steps: Litebox to refine logos based on feedback, share brand guidelines and slide deck design inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Focus for next phase: Design a simple, compelling homepage as the main deliverable](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)

## Topics

### Logo Design Review

  - [Option A: Refined letter shapes to match symbol's curves/corners, maintaining symbol hierarchy](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Option B: Used diamond shape across all letters, with symbol resting on x-height axis](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Marcel appreciated the thoughtful approach to proportions and aspect ratios](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)

### Feedback and Preferences

  - [Marcel liked unique letterforms in Option B (e.g. R reminiscent of rose.com)](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Suggested using uppercase G for Option B, keeping other elements same as current iteration](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [For Option A, straightening end of G and refining H/T tails for better cohesion](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Overall, leaning towards Option B with uppercase G and minor refinements](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)

### Homepage Design

  - [Prioritize designing a simple, compelling homepage as next main deliverable](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Marcel can adapt current site himself, swapping logos and branding elements](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [Focus on homepage allows delivering value quickly vs. full site redesign now](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Subsequent phases to expand to other sections (blog, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Litebox to refine logo options and share updated versions](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Share brand guidelines/runbook](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Provide slide deck design inspiration for Marcel to adapt presentations](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Design focus: Simple, high-impact homepage as main next deliverable](https://fathom.video/share/CsSgyrtKuuz_xNPB7BfKCF7VaZthUL5z?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)

action_items.description: Send feedback and meeting summary including action items and points discussed
Finalize logo design, provide guidelines for slide deck design, and share logo design options and brand guidelines
Design simple one-page homepage and provide Figma files for Marcel to adapt
